name: Camb AI Moderation
description: Camb AI — multilingual speech + text moderation API with 150+ language coverage.

seo.title: Camb AI Moderation — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Camb AI Moderation: Camb AI — multilingual speech + text moderation API with 150+ language coverage.

when_to_use: Moderating audio and voice content for hate speech and profanity
Running multilingual audio toxicity detection on user recordings
Building voice chat safety systems for gaming and social apps
Detecting policy violations in podcast or livestream audio

pros: Speech plus text in a single API
Useful for global voice apps and non-English markets
cons: Young company, less battle-tested than incumbents
Accuracy in long-tail languages hard to verify
review.verdict: Promising for multilingual speech moderation but early; validate accuracy on your specific languages first.
review.best_for: Global voice or chat products with users across dozens of non-English languages.
review.not_for: Risk-averse teams needing proven vendors with deep reference customers.
